# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: service-1
    url: http://service-1-backend
    load_balancer:
      type: roundrobin

  - name: service-2
    url: http://service-2-backend
    load_balancer:
      type: roundrobin

routes:
  - name: route-1
    paths:
      - /api/v1/endpoint-1
    services:
      - name: service-1

  - name: route-2
    paths:
      - /api/v1/endpoint-2
    services:
      - name: service-2
